full_quote:
I had the pleasure of working with Kyle on a design research project in Nairobi for an international client to understand people's personal finances, and he is a talented UX researcher with a wealth of knowledge and experience.

A meticulous researcher, he ensured that the project was thoroughly researched and the insights were based on solid data.

In addition to being an excellent communicator, he is capable of distilling complex research findings into clear, concise reports and presentations.

I highly recommend Kyle for any design research role and am confident that he will excel in whatever challenge he takes on next.
